sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between multiple weapons: default handgun, shotgun, machine gun, homing gun, laser rifle, and grenade launcher. Special weapons consume Gun Energy gauge and revert to handgun when depleted.

special_mechanics.name: Prone Stance
special_mechanics.description: Character can lie down; gun aiming restricted to left/right directions in all stances.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Sources document gameplay mechanics, controls, and general structure but contain no numerical physics parameters. Game follows standard NES platformer conventions with shooting mechanics. Character can lie down and aim weapons; movement controls are standard for side-scrolling action games of the era.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Journey to Silius page
